# Pull Request

## Summary

<!-- What changed and why? -->

## Checks

- [ ] Tests or fixtures were updated when behavior changed.
- [ ] Public docs or examples were updated when user-facing behavior changed.
- [ ] I ran the relevant Bun commands, or explained why they were skipped.
- [ ] `dist/` and `out/` generated artifacts are not committed.
- [ ] This change does not add private GitHub data collection, developer ranking language, secrets, telemetry, or hosted-service assumptions.

## Commands

<!-- Example: bun test; bun run build; bun run build:card; bun run build:report -->
